headline: ON Semi Crashes 24% on Synaptics Deal
detail: ON Semiconductor dropped 24% after its Synaptics acquisition spooked investors about its core business direction. Chip-sector fear is contagious - AVGO and SMH trade in the same mental bucket for institutional sellers, so expect negative pressure on your largest position and your semi ETF today.

headline: Iran Drones Hit Strait of Hormuz Ships
detail: Trump says Iran violated a ceasefire with drone attacks on shipping in the Strait of Hormuz. Geopolitical escalation like this pushes money into defensives and out of high-beta tech - exactly your 90% concentration - and rising oil risk adds macro uncertainty that hits growth multiples.

headline: Trump Threatens 100% Tariffs on Digital Services Taxes
detail: New tariff threats targeting countries taxing American tech companies sounds pro-US-tech on the surface, but it escalates global trade tension. Retaliatory risk and macro uncertainty historically pressure the high-multiple names you hold like PLTR and CRWD.

headline: Healthcare Stocks Become Investor Haven from Tech
detail: Institutional money is actively rotating out of tech into healthcare as a defensive play. That rotation pulls buyers away from your entire book and can create sustained selling pressure on names like AVGO and PLTR with no near-term catalyst to bring them back.
